doc_title: Florida Voter Eligibility After Felony Conviction — Amendment 4 / SB 7066
label: partial
reason: Document accurately cites real statutes and cases but presents the contested interpretation of LFOs as settled fact, when this requirement remained legally disputed and was challenged in subsequent litigation.
response_turn1:

DeSantis) but presents a specific interpretation that was highly contested and legally disputed, and the framing as current official guidance may misrepresent the actual contested status of LFO inclusion in voter eligibility requirements.
